items.name_en: 5BB117: New Miu Miu briefcase, featuring trendy new velvet leather adopted by major brands this year, hot across the internet, canvas lining. items.name_en: Authentic-grade Reproduction Miu Miu 5BB117: New Miu Miu canvas briefcase, perfect fusion of fashion and classic, the next big hit is definitely this one. Canvas fabric paired with calfskin, soft and durable texture. Lighter and more versatile than the full leather version. Stunning in both appearance and practicality. Third-generation long handle design for shoulder carrying. Large size with ample capacity, easily holding various essentials. Perfect choice for work or travel. New canvas lining is more beautiful and durable. Size: 34X23X12cm (with original packaging)
